description: Style NoteMixing classic natural prints with a hint of the exotic (nailing the latest summer trend) colour block this top from Tonga with for an effortlessly breezy vibe. For winter, you can smarten this up by layering it with a pastel toned cardi or a colour pop blazer. Product DetailsBlack tunic style top with a mandarin collar and a split neckline, half buttoned placket, three quarter raglan sleeves with elastication at the cuffs, embroidery below the midriff, two loops at the sides and a fabric beltMaterial and Care32% silk, 68% cottonHandwashDo not bleachDry on a flat surfaceSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
